types:type.name: samplle_json
types:type.types:shape:
%dw 2.0
type samplle_json = {| masterOrganizationId: String, organizationId: String, id: Number {"typeId": "int"}, name: String, description: Null, limits: Array<{| maximumRequests: Number {"typeId": "int"}, timePeriodInMilliseconds: Number {"typeId": "int"}, visible: Boolean |}>, status: String, autoApprove: Boolean, applicationCount: Number {"typeId": "int"}, apiId: Number {"typeId": "int"} |} {"example": "{\\\"masterOrganizationId\\\":\\\"xxx\\\",\\\"organizationId\\\":\\\"xxx\\\",\\\"id\\\":2075526,\\\"name\\\":\\\"Tier 1\\\",\\\"description\\\":null,\\\"limits\\\":[{\\\"maximumRequests\\\":1,\\\"timePeriodInMilliseconds\\\":10000,\\\"visible\\\":true},{\\\"maximumRequests\\\":2,\\\"timePeriodInMilliseconds\\\":45000,\\\"visible\\\":true}],\\\"status\\\":\\\"ACTIVE\\\",\\\"autoApprove\\\":false,\\\"applicationCount\\\":0,\\\"apiId\\\":20070196}"}

types:type.name: sample2
types:type.types:shape:
%dw 2.0
type sample2 = {| masterOrganizationId: String, organizationId: String, id: Number {"typeId": "int"}, name: String, description: Null, limits: Array<{| maximumRequests: Number {"typeId": "int"}, timePeriodInMilliseconds: Number {"typeId": "int"}, visible: Boolean |}>, status: String, autoApprove: Boolean, applicationCount: Number {"typeId": "int"}, apiId: Number {"typeId": "int"} |} {"example": "{\\\"masterOrganizationId\\\":\\\"xxx\\\",\\\"organizationId\\\":\\\"xxx\\\",\\\"id\\\":2075526,\\\"name\\\":\\\"Tier 1\\\",\\\"description\\\":null,\\\"limits\\\":[{\\\"maximumRequests\\\":1,\\\"timePeriodInMilliseconds\\\":10000,\\\"visible\\\":true},{\\\"maximumRequests\\\":2,\\\"timePeriodInMilliseconds\\\":45000,\\\"visible\\\":true}],\\\"status\\\":\\\"ACTIVE\\\",\\\"autoApprove\\\":false,\\\"applicationCount\\\":0,\\\"apiId\\\":20070196}"}
